policies.title: 国家能源局关于推进 2026 年风电光伏发电开发建设的通知
policies.title_en: NEA Notice on Promoting 2026 Wind and Solar Development
policies.summary: 国家能源局发布 2026 年可再生能源发展目标，风电光伏新增装机目标 200GW，配储要求不低于 15%...
policies.summary_en: NEA released 2026 renewable energy targets with 200GW new wind and solar capacity and minimum 15% storage requirement...

policies.title: 新型储能发展实施方案（2026-2030 年）
policies.title_en: Implementation Plan for New Energy Storage Development (2026-2030)
policies.summary: 明确 2026-2030 年新型储能发展目标，累计装机规模达到 100GW 以上...
policies.summary_en: Defines 2026-2030 new energy storage development goals with cumulative capacity exceeding 100GW...

policies.title: 可再生能源电力消纳保障机制考核办法

policies.summary: 完善可再生能源电力消纳保障机制，明确各省份消纳责任权重...
policies.summary_en: Improves renewable energy consumption guarantee mechanism with clear provincial responsibilities...

policies.title: 关于完善风电上网电价政策的通知
policies.title_en: Notice on Improving Wind Power Feed-in Tariff Policy
policies.summary: 完善风电上网电价形成机制，推进平价上网...
policies.summary_en: Improves wind power feed-in tariff formation mechanism and promotes grid parity...

policies.title: 光伏发电项目建设管理办法

policies.summary: 规范光伏发电项目建设管理，优化审批流程...
policies.summary_en: Standardizes PV power station construction management and optimizes approval process...

policies.title: 关于促进储能技术与产业发展的指导意见
policies.title_en: Guidance on Promoting Energy Storage Technology and Industry
policies.summary: 促进储能技术创新和产业发展，完善支持政策...
policies.summary_en: Promotes energy storage technology innovation and industry development with supportive policies...

policies.title: 清洁能源消纳行动计划（2026-2030 年）
policies.summary: 制定 2026-2030 年清洁能源消纳行动计划，降低弃风弃光率...
policies.summary_en: Develops 2026-2030 clean energy consumption action plan to reduce curtailment rates...

policies.summary: 制定能源领域碳达峰实施方案，推动能源绿色低碳转型...
